nodes.name: Watch QUEUE
nodes.notes: Fires when a new .json file lands in QUEUE/. Update path if VAULT_PATH changes.

nodes.name: Read Task
nodes.notes: Reads task JSON, sets route and model. CODEâ†’qwen2.5-coder:7b, VISIONâ†’minicpm-v:8b, RESEARCHâ†’HANDOFF, all othersâ†’qwen3:14b. Returns [] for non-PENDING tasks.

nodes.name: Route?
nodes.notes: true (output 0) â†’ Ollama (CODE=qwen2.5-coder:7b, VISION=minicpm-v:8b, default=qwen3:14b). false (output 1) â†’ Non-Ollama Handler (RESEARCHâ†’HANDOFF).

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.model || 'qwen3:14b', system: 'You are a task assistant for SFV Engine, a photography production system.
Branches: MYTHOLOGY, SFV_LIVE, SFV_EVENTS, SFV_ATHLETICS, SFV_STUDIO, SFV_UGC, SFV_ARCHIVE, SFV_WORLD, SFV_404
Revenue: UGC content retainers + EVENTS on-site portraits
Your role: handle specific low-value tasks only. Be structured. Never make creative decisions.
If unsure, say UNSURE — never guess.
Output exactly what is asked. No extra commentary.', prompt: $json.prompt, stream: false, keep_alive: '10m' }) }}

nodes.name: Call Ollama
nodes.notes: POSTs to Ollama with model from task (CODE=qwen2.5-coder:7b, VISION=minicpm-v:8b, default=qwen3:14b). keep_alive=10m. Timeout 5 min.

nodes.name: Write + Log
nodes.notes: Phase 1 validation per OUTPUT_VALIDATION.md. Strips <think> blocks. CLASSIFY: branch check. SUMMARIZE: word count. CODE: def/class check. VISION: length+refusal check. VALIDATED→OUTPUTS, ESCALATED→HANDOFFS.

nodes.name: Non-Ollama Handler
nodes.notes: RESEARCH â†’ writes HANDOFF JSON for Claude. Updates task status to ESCALATED and logs to DECISION_LOG.

_sfv_notes: Import: n8n Settings â†’ Workflows â†’ Import from file
Pre-requisites: run n8n_env.ps1 first â€” sets OLLAMA_URL, VAULT_PATH, NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN=fs,path
Model routing: CODEâ†’qwen2.5-coder:7b, VISIONâ†’minicpm-v:8b, CLASSIFY/SUMMARIZE/defaultâ†’qwen3:14b, RESEARCHâ†’HANDOFF
Confidence routing: HIGH â†’ OUTPUTS/[task_id]_RESULT.md | LOW â†’ HANDOFFS/[task_id]_HANDOFF.json
RESEARCH tasks: write HANDOFF directly for Claude (no Perplexity/Tavily integration active)
keep_alive=10m on all Ollama calls â€” pairs with Workflow 2 pre-warm cron
